channel.title: Foss on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Foss on Arrans github.io

item.title: usememos/memos
item.description: An open-source, self-hosted note-taking service. Your thoughts, your data, your control — no tracking, no ads, no subscription fees.

item.title: spacebarchat/spacebarchat
item.description: 📬 Spacebar is a free open source selfhostable discord compatible communication platform

item.title: zulip/zulip
item.description: Zulip server and web application. Open-source team chat that helps teams stay productive and focused.

item.title: RocketChat/Rocket.Chat
item.description: The communications platform that puts data protection first.

item.title: FossifyOrg/Calendar
item.description: A simple calendar with events, customizable widgets and no ads.

item.title: aleksey-saenko/MusicRecognizer
item.description: An Android application for music recognition that uses AudD and ACRCloud services to perform song identification.

item.title: RayJW/awesome-foss
item.description: A collection of all the FOSS software I regularly use or follow to keep track of privacy respecting alternatives. This is a mirror of a Codeberg repository.
